insight.headline: Storefront API Update
insight.what_changed: The Storefront API now supports the @inContext directive with an optional channelId argument, allowing developers to apply a specific sales channel's context to an entire query. This change is available in Storefront API version 2026-10. The @inContext directive can be used to fetch data specific to a particular sales channel, such as online store or point of sale.
insight.developer_impact: Developers using the Storefront API should update their queries to include the channelId argument when necessary. This change enables more flexibility in querying data specific to different sales channels. Developers should review their existing queries and update them to take advantage of this new feature. The Storefront API documentation should be consulted for more information on using the @inContext directive with channelId.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may see more accurate and relevant data in their sales channels, as developers can now query data specific to each channel.
insight.why_it_matters: This update provides more flexibility and accuracy in querying sales channel-specific data, which can lead to better decision-making and more effective sales strategies for merchants.

also_worth_knowing.text: Card deposit endpoint now requires mTLS certificate

updates.title: Physical inventory feature preview
updates.summary: The physical inventory feature preview is available in the unstable version of the GraphQL Admin API, allowing developers to build and test against new inventory APIs.
The Shopify CLI version 4.5.2 fixes a warning when running theme commands in valid theme directories and bumps Shopify/theme-tools packages.

updates.title: Card deposit endpoint now requires mTLS certificate
updates.summary: The card deposit endpoint now requires a Shopify-issued mTLS client certificate, affecting apps that store cardholder data.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.2
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package version 13.0.2 adds non-interactive shop and storefront creation flags and allows bypassing confirmation prompts in hydrogen upgrade.

updates.title: Updated App Store requirements: 4.1.2 Use a unique name for your app
updates.summary: The App Store requirements have been updated to include the use of a unique name for each app to reduce merchant confusion.

updates.title: Storefront API `@inContext` supports `channelId`
updates.summary: The Storefront API @inContext directive now supports the channelId argument, allowing developers to apply a specific sales channel's context to an entire query.

updates.title: `productId`, `title`,`variantSku`, and `variantTitle` fields added to `ExchangeLineItem`
updates.summary: The ExchangeLineItem type now includes productId, title, variantSku, and variantTitle fields.

updates.title: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components
updates.summary: The POS UI Extensions API version 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components, allowing apps to access component-level discount allocations.
The Shopify CLI version 4.5.1 bumps the cli-hydrogen package to version 13.0.1.
The Shopify CLI version 4.5.0 introduces new store commands, including listing and store creation.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package version 13.0.1 reads disabled command metadata and stops those commands with an actionable error, and preserves actionable build errors during h2 deploy.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: The @shopify/create-hydrogen package version 5.0.38 adds an explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects and uses jsconfig.json for JavaScript projects.

recap.headline: Shopify updates GraphQL Admin API, Hydrogen, and Storefront API with new features and requirements

themes.title: New API Features
themes.detail: The physical inventory feature preview is available in the unstable version of the GraphQL Admin API, and the Storefront API `@inContext` directive now supports `channelId`. Additionally, new fields have been added to the `ExchangeLineItem` type, and POS UI Extensions 2026-07 includes discount allocations to bundle components.

themes.title: Security and Authentication
themes.detail: The card deposit endpoint now requires a Shopify-issued mTLS client certificate, and apps that store cardholder data must be updated to use this certificate. The `@shopify/cli-hydrogen` package has been updated to version 13.0.2 with non-interactive shop and storefront creation flags.

themes.title: Development Tools and Requirements
themes.detail: The Shopify CLI has been updated to version 4.5.2 with bug fixes and new store commands, and the App Store requirements have been updated to include a unique name for each app. The `@shopify/cli-hydrogen` package has been updated to version 13.0.2 with new features and bug fixes.

actions.text: Enable physical inventory feature preview on a development store
Update apps to use Shopify-issued mTLS client certificate for card deposit endpoint
Review and update app names to comply with App Store requirement 4.1.2
